events.label: assistant
events.text:
I traced the CPM logic: P (Flooring, predecessor N) runs in parallel with O (Trim carpentry, also predecessor N) into the shared successor Q (Final inspection). O's 3-day duration (finishing day 46) governs Q's start, giving P (originally finishing day 44) 2 workdays of float. The disruption adds 1 day to P (now finishing day 45), which is fully absorbed by that float — Q still starts day 46, and project finish stays at workday 47.

Result written to `/app/answer.json`: `value: 0` (no delay to project finish), `decision: pass`, `risk: low`, with rationale explaining P is non-critical and 1 day of float remains.
